cacheItem.title: @ToKTeacher: To elevate how impressive AI is many will jump straight to bringing down actual

payload.title: @ToKTeacher: To elevate how impressive AI is many will jump straight to bringing down actual
payload.text:
To elevate how impressive AI is many will jump straight to bringing down actual people. And that’s what you have there. Exaggerate the capabilities of these new calculators by diminishing the capabilities of humans.

But *why* that impulse?

It’s a strange epoch we’ve entered.
